'''ngazusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidegild|hidegild]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidegild|hidegild]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngazusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzisith|ngæzisith]] || [[word:ngæzisij|ngæzisij]] || [[word:ngæzisish|ngæzisish]] || [[word:ngæzisi|ngæzisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazuzusuth|ngazuzusuth]] || [[word:ngazuzusuj|ngazuzusuj]] || [[word:ngazuzusush|ngazuzusush]] || [[word:ngazuzusu|ngazuzusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazusuth|ngazusuth]] || [[word:ngazusuj|ngazusuj]] || [[word:ngazusush|ngazusush]] || [[word:ngazusu|ngazusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazufsuth|ngazufsuth]] || [[word:ngazufsuj|ngazufsuj]] || [[word:ngazufsush|ngazufsush]] || [[word:ngazufsuf|ngazufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazusuthu|ngazusuthu]] || [[word:ngazusuju|ngazusuju]] || [[word:ngazusushu|ngazusushu]] || [[word:ngazusuku|ngazusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazusuth|ngazusuth]] || [[word:ngazusuj|ngazusuj]] || [[word:ngazusush|ngazusush]] || [[word:ngazusu|ngazusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazusuthul|ngazusuthul]] || [[word:ngazusujul|ngazusujul]] || [[word:ngazusushul|ngazusushul]] || [[word:ngazusukul|ngazusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazusuthuthu|ngazusuthuthu]] || [[word:ngazusujuju|ngazusujuju]] || [[word:ngazusushushu|ngazusushushu]] || [[word:ngazusuku|ngazusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazusuthun|ngazusuthun]] || [[word:ngazusujun|ngazusujun]] || [[word:ngazusushun|ngazusushun]] || [[word:ngazusukun|ngazusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazusuthuoro|ngazusuthuoro]] || [[word:ngazusujuoro|ngazusujuoro]] || [[word:ngazusushuoro|ngazusushuoro]] || [[word:ngazusukuoro|ngazusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
